function.name: catalog_lepidoptera_specimen
function.description: Add a new butterfly or moth specimen to the museum collection database with morphological notes.

prompt: Log a new Papilio machaon specimen, wingspan 78.4 mm, collected in Carpathian foothills.

function.name: tag_amphibian_with_pit
function.description: Insert a Passive Integrated Transponder tag into a captured amphibian for mark-recapture studies.

prompt: Tag salamander SAL-22 with PIT code 4E3A91FF, SVL 64.2 mm.

function.name: assay_lichen_oxygen_uptake
function.description: Measure respiration rate of a lichen thallus using a Clark-type electrode.

prompt: Run an oxygen uptake assay on thallus LCH-103 at 15 C for 30 minutes.

function.name: score_coral_bleaching_index
function.description: Assign a CoralWatch color score to a tagged colony.

prompt: Record colony AGRP-7 at bleaching score 2.

function.name: extract_environmental_dna
function.description: Filter and extract eDNA from a water sample for metabarcoding.

prompt: Extract eDNA from pond sample EDN-19 using a 0.45 um filter over 1.5 liters.

function.name: ring_passerine_bird
function.description: Apply a metal numbered ring to a captured songbird at a banding station.

prompt: Ring a Phylloscopus collybita (code PHYCO) with ring AB12345, wing chord 61 mm.

function.name: stain_fungal_hyphae
function.description: Apply lactophenol cotton blue or similar stain to a fungal mount for microscopy.

prompt: Stain slide FUN-08 with lactophenol cotton blue for 5 minutes.

function.name: measure_otolith_growth_rings
function.description: Count daily growth increments on a fish otolith under polarized light.

prompt: Record 142 daily rings on otolith OTO-227.

function.name: deploy_pitfall_trap
function.description: Set up a pitfall trap for ground-dwelling arthropods at a vegetation plot.

prompt: Set 8 pitfall traps in plot VP-04 with propylene glycol.

function.name: record_bat_echolocation_call
function.description: Save an acoustic recording of a bat call sequence for species ID.

prompt: Log bat call on detector ANABAT-2, peak 45 kHz, 6.3 ms duration.

function.name: swab_amphibian_for_bd
function.description: Collect a skin swab for Batrachochytrium dendrobatidis qPCR screening.

prompt: Swab frog FR-12 for Bd with 30 strokes per region.

function.name: press_herbarium_voucher
function.description: Place a plant specimen in a herbarium press with field metadata.

prompt: Press a voucher of Sphagnum capillifolium collected by A. Ivanova, accession HER-9921.

function.name: anesthetize_teleost_with_ms222
function.description: Sedate a fish with buffered MS-222 for measurement.

prompt: Anesthetize trout TRT-3 with 100 mg/L MS-222.

function.name: count_pollen_grains_on_slide
function.description: Manual count of pollen grains in a 1 mm2 grid square.

prompt: Counted 287 pollen grains on slide POL-77.

function.name: log_camera_trap_event
function.description: Register a mammal detection event from a remote camera trap.

prompt: Camera CT-15 captured a Lynx lynx at 2026-04-22T03:14:00.

function.name: necropsy_marine_mammal
function.description: Open a necropsy record for a stranded cetacean or pinniped.

prompt: Open necropsy for stranded Phocoena phocoena, case STR-441, decomp code 3.

function.name: weigh_chick_in_nest
function.description: Record nestling body mass during a nest visit.

prompt: Weigh the second-hatched chick in nest box NBX-22, mass 14.7 g.

function.name: transcribe_field_journal_page
function.description: Transcribe a hand-written field journal page into the database.

prompt: Transcribe page 47 of journal FJ-2025-N03: 'Three Salamandra salamandra observed near brook at dusk.'

gold_args.text: Three Salamandra salamandra observed near brook at dusk.

function.name: incubate_reptile_egg_clutch
function.description: Initiate incubation for a reptile egg clutch at given temperature regime.

prompt: Incubate clutch GECK-09 of 6 eggs at 28.5 C.

function.name: label_diatom_slide
function.description: Generate a label for a permanent diatom mount slide.

prompt: Label diatom slide DIA-512 mounted in Naphrax.

function.name: score_body_condition_ungulate
function.description: Assign a body condition score 1-5 to a captured ungulate.

prompt: Score red deer RD-118 at body condition 4.

function.name: snip_tail_for_genotype
function.description: Collect a small tail biopsy from a lizard for genotyping.

prompt: Take 3 mm tail snip from Lacerta agilis LA-77 for genotyping.

function.name: log_phenology_first_flower
function.description: Record the first observed flowering date for a plant population.

prompt: Population ANEM-12 of Anemone nemorosa first flowered on 2026-04-08.

function.name: set_mist_net
function.description: Open a mist net for bird capture at a given location.

prompt: Set a 12 m mist net at site KUR-A with 30 mm mesh.

function.name: preserve_invert_in_ethanol
function.description: Transfer an invertebrate specimen into ethanol for storage.

prompt: Preserve specimen INV-2201 in 96% ethanol.

function.name: count_aphid_colony_size
function.description: Estimate aphid colony size on a host plant leaf.

prompt: Counted 412 aphids on leaf APH-014.

function.name: drop_oxygen_probe_in_pond
function.description: Deploy a dissolved oxygen probe at a given pond depth.

prompt: Drop DO probe in pond P-09 at 1.2 m depth.

function.name: isolate_actinomycete_colony
function.description: Pick a soil-derived actinomycete colony from a streaked plate to liquid culture.

prompt: Isolate colony C3 from plate ACT-08.

function.name: record_dawn_chorus_minute
function.description: Save a minute of dawn chorus audio at a survey point.

prompt: Record dawn chorus at point CHO-N3, 4 minutes after sunrise.

function.name: harvest_truffle_under_oak
function.description: Record a hypogeous fungus harvest event under a host tree.

prompt: Harvested 84.5 g of Tuber aestivum under oak TR-OAK-19.

function.name: stage_drosophila_egg_chamber
function.description: Assign a developmental stage (1-14) to a Drosophila ovariole egg chamber based on King's morphological criteria.

prompt: Tatiana K. examined egg chamber DM-EC-31 and called it stage 10A.

function.name: quantify_chlorophyll_a_in_extract
function.description: Compute chlorophyll a concentration from a 663/645 nm spectrophotometric reading of acetone extract.

prompt: Quantify chl a for extract CHL-A-44 with A663=0.812, A645=0.341, extract volume 10 mL.

function.name: schedule_acoustic_anabat_survey
function.description: Schedule an automated bat acoustic survey on a passive detector across a date window.

prompt: Schedule Anabat unit AB-NORTH-3 for passive bat acoustic survey from June 1 through June 15, 2026, with trigger threshold 18 dB.

function.name: subsample_zooplankton_tow
function.description: Take a Folsom splitter subsample from a vertical zooplankton tow.

prompt: Halve tow ZPL-441 using a Folsom splitter and preserve in 4% formalin.

function.name: barcode_coi_marker
function.description: Run a COI barcode PCR on extracted invertebrate DNA using LCO1490/HCO2198 primers.

prompt: Run COI barcode PCR on DNA-INV-512 with annealing 48 C, 35 cycles.

function.name: calibrate_underwater_hydrophone
function.description: Calibrate a SoundTrap hydrophone against a reference tone before a marine survey.

reference_db.description: Reference tone level dB re 1 uPa

prompt: Calibrate hydrophone serial ST671523 to 178.4 dB at 250 Hz before tomorrow's cetacean tow.

function.name: perform_floral_dissection
function.description: Dissect a flower under a stereomicroscope and document floral formula components.

prompt: Dissect orchid OR-77: 3 sepals, 3 petals, 1 stamen visible under scope.

function.name: annotate_owl_pellet_contents
function.description: Catalog small mammal remains recovered from a dissected owl pellet.

prompt: From barn owl pellet OWL-31 we recovered remains of Microtus arvalis and Sorex araneus, 3 skulls total.

function.name: phenotype_arabidopsis_rosette
function.description: Measure rosette traits of an Arabidopsis plant from a top-down image.

prompt: Plant AT-Col0-44 has rosette area 18.6 cm2 with 14 leaves.

function.name: count_nematode_gall_density
function.description: Count root-knot nematode galls on a defined length of root for population estimates.

prompt: Found 47 root-knot galls on root RT-09 along an inspected 12 cm length.

function.name: perform_telemetry_triangulation
function.description: Cross-bearing triangulation of a radio-collared animal from three receiver stations.

prompt: Triangulate the collar on frequency 150.330 MHz with bearings 071 from A, 142 from B, and 219 from C.

function.name: load_microbiome_16s_run
function.description: Load a multiplexed 16S rRNA sequencing run with barcoded samples for downstream DADA2.

prompt: Load 16S run R-MISEQ-117 with 96 pooled samples, V3-V4 region.

function.name: score_oviposition_site_choice
function.description: Record container choice scores for a female mosquito in an oviposition assay.

prompt: Aedes aegypti female AA-77 laid 12, 0, 33, 4 eggs across the four oviposition cups.

function.name: dehydrate_plant_for_sem
function.description: Run a graded ethanol dehydration series on a plant tissue sample for scanning electron microscopy.

prompt: Dehydrate trichome sample TR-SEM-9 through 30, 50, 70, 90, 100 percent ethanol, 15 min each.

function.name: track_butterfly_flight_path
function.description: Record a GPS-pinged flight path of a tagged butterfly across waypoints.

function.name: score_oak_gall_morphotype
function.description: Assign a morphotype code to a cynipid oak gall and record host oak species.

prompt: Gall OAK-G-181 is morphotype M7-spiny on Quercus robur.

function.name: screen_tick_for_borrelia
function.description: Run a multiplex PCR on a tick lysate for Borrelia burgdorferi sensu lato.

prompt: Screen Ixodes ricinus tick IR-2024-991 with 5 uL lysate using primer set OspA-flaB.

function.name: log_seabird_diving_event
function.description: Record a single dive event from a TDR (time-depth recorder) on a seabird.

prompt: Log dive from TDR PUF-7 on a puffin: max 41.8 m, duration 92.4 s.

function.name: preserve_jellyfish_in_propylene_glycol
function.description: Transfer a gelatinous zooplankton specimen to propylene glycol after formalin pre-fixation.

prompt: Preserve Aurelia aurita specimen JF-77 with bell 88 mm after 6 h formalin pre-fixation.

function.name: set_emergence_trap_on_stream
function.description: Deploy an emergence trap above a stream riffle to sample emerging aquatic insects.

prompt: Deploy a 0.5 m2 emergence trap on reach STR-MAY-3 for 7 days.

function.name: annotate_pollinator_visit
function.description: Record a pollinator visit event including handling time and pollen load class.

prompt: On flower FLW-22 a Bombus terrestris worker stayed 4.7 seconds with heavy load class 3.

function.name: score_paleobotanical_cuticle
function.description: Assign a stomatal index to a Mesozoic plant cuticle from light microscopy.

prompt: On Jurassic Ginkgo cuticle JCU-12 I counted 19 stomata against 184 epidermal cells in the same field.

function.name: perform_belt_transect_count
function.description: Record total individuals of a target species along a fixed-width belt transect.

prompt: Along transect REEF-T7 we counted 23 Acanthurus triostegus.

function.name: monitor_sea_turtle_nest
function.description: Update a sea turtle nest record with monitoring observations.

prompt: Loggerhead nest CC-N-19 is 42 days since laying with no predation observed.

function.name: score_hyena_clan_interaction
function.description: Tally agonistic interactions among clan members observed during a focal scan.

prompt: Over a 30-minute focal scan of clan TALK-W we logged 7 aggressive acts.

function.name: log_freshwater_mussel_glochidia
function.description: Record glochidia release event from a gravid freshwater mussel.

prompt: Mussel UO-99 (Unio crassus) released 14,200 glochidia onto host Cottus gobio.

function.name: sample_soil_collembola_core
function.description: Take a Tullgren-extracted soil core sample for springtail community analysis.

prompt: Take soil core CL-44 to 5 cm depth and run Tullgren extraction for 72 hours.

function.name: estimate_population_with_jolly_seber
function.description: Run a Jolly-Seber open population estimate on a capture history matrix.

prompt: For shrew study SHRW-21 with 5 sampling occasions and captures [42, 38, 41, 35, 40] run a Jolly-Seber estimate.

function.name: tag_shark_with_satellite
function.description: Attach a pop-up satellite archival tag to a captured shark.

prompt: Attach PSAT tag with serial PSAT-A-1192 to blue shark BSH-04, programmed to pop up in 180 days.

function.name: score_galapagos_finch_beak
function.description: Record beak morphology measurements for a Geospiza individual.

prompt: Measure Geospiza fortis individual GF-217: beak depth 9.4 mm, length 11.1 mm.

function.name: score_coral_recruit_settlement
function.description: Count coral recruits settled on a deployed ceramic tile array and classify by family.

prompt: Tile REC-T-21 after 90 days soak: 6 Acroporidae, 3 Pocilloporidae, 1 Poritidae recruits.

function.name: log_orchid_mycorrhizal_partner
function.description: Record the mycorrhizal fungal partner isolated from an orchid protocorm.

prompt: Orchid Dactylorhiza fuchsii DAF-19 yielded Tulasnella calospora via pelloton plating.

function.name: measure_caterpillar_frass_output
function.description: Weigh frass produced by a feeding lepidopteran larva over a fixed period.

prompt: Larva LYM-44 produced 312 mg of frass over a 24 h feeding window.

function.name: record_woodpecker_drumming_bout
function.description: Log a drumming bout by a male woodpecker including roll rate and bout length.

prompt: Male great spotted woodpecker DEN-22 drummed at 16.2 rolls/s for 1.4 seconds.

function.name: score_sea_urchin_test_diameter
function.description: Record test diameter of a sea urchin specimen with gonad index.

prompt: Sea urchin URC-77 has test diameter 54.8 mm and gonad index 0.17.

function.name: ascribe_lichen_substrate_preference
function.description: Given a list of substrate occurrence counts for a lichen species across substrate categories, infer dominant substrate and store ecological notes.

prompt: We surveyed Xanthoria parietina across an urban park: 22 occurrences on Acer bark, 14 on concrete walls, 3 on Tilia twigs. Note that most thalli faced southwest. Save ecological notes accordingly.

function.name: fit_growth_curve_to_otolith_series
function.description: Fit a von Bertalanffy growth curve to age-length pairs derived from otolith reads.

lengths_cm.description: Total length in cm per fish

prompt: Fit growth curve for Baltic cod stock BC-NE-2025 with ages 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 years and lengths 18, 32, 44, 53, 60 cm. Use Linf initial guess of 95 cm.

function.name: synthesize_microbiome_alpha_diversity_report
function.description: Compute Shannon and Chao1 indices on per-sample ASV count vectors and write report.

prompt: Project GUTMICR-Q2 has two samples: S-A with ASV counts [50, 30, 20, 10] and S-B with [100, 5, 5, 90]. Rarefy to depth 110 and compute alpha diversity report.

function.name: design_translocation_release_plan
function.description: Compose a translocation release plan including soft-release pen schedule and supplementary feeding tapering.

prompt: Plan translocation of 12 European hamsters (Cricetus cricetus) from source population SRC-RHEN to target site TGT-LIM, with 21 days in soft-release pen and supplemental feed tapered over 45 days.

function.name: estimate_pheromone_plume_dispersion
function.description: Model atmospheric dispersion of a moth sex pheromone plume from a point source under given wind conditions.

prompt: Model the moth pheromone plume from source LURE-77 with wind 2.3 m/s from 215 degrees, Pasquill class C, emission 4.8 ng/s.

function.name: deconvolute_mixed_amphibian_chorus
function.description: Run a CNN-based deconvolution on overlapping anuran calls to estimate per-species call counts in a clip.

prompt: Deconvolute chorus clip CHOR-NORTH-44 using model v2.3.1, expecting Rana arvalis, Bufo bufo and Hyla arborea, with confidence threshold 0.65.

function.name: reconstruct_phylogeny_from_alignment
function.description: Reconstruct a maximum-likelihood phylogeny from a multi-locus alignment with partitioned models.

prompt: Build an ML phylogeny from /data/align/chiropterans.fasta with partitions GTR+G for COI and HKY+I for cytb, 1000 bootstraps, outgroup Pteropus vampyrus.

function.name: model_predator_prey_lotka_volterra
function.description: Simulate a 2-species predator-prey system with extended Lotka-Volterra parameters.

prompt: Simulate lynx-hare dynamics with prey r=1.1, predation a=0.4, predator mortality m=0.9, conversion b=0.1, over 50 years.

function.name: score_paleo_pollen_assemblage_zone
function.description: Run a CONISS-style zonation on a stratified pollen percentage matrix from a lake core.

depth_pct_matrix.description: List of percentage rows per depth

prompt: On lake core LK-NORD-3 with taxa [Pinus, Betula, Quercus] and percentages at three depths [[80,10,10],[60,30,10],[20,40,40]], run CONISS zonation with minimum 2 zones.

function.name: annotate_gut_parasite_burden
function.description: Record helminth burden estimates from a small-mammal necropsy with worm counts by genus.

prompt: On wood mouse APO-101 (Apodemus sylvaticus, 24.3 g), I counted 18 Heligmosomoides and 4 Syphacia in the gut.

function.name: compose_marxan_conservation_scenario
function.description: Configure a Marxan systematic conservation planning scenario with conservation features and cost surfaces.

prompt: Build Marxan scenario CARP-RES-A with targets 30% for old-growth-beech, 50% for capercaillie-habitat, 20% for bear-corridor; cost surface at /gis/cost/opportunity_cost.tif; BLM 0.7.

function.name: calibrate_isotope_mixing_model
function.description: Run a Bayesian SIAR-style stable isotope mixing model to estimate diet proportions from consumer and source isotope values.

prompt: Run mixing model on otter sample OTR-44 with d13C=-22.4 and d15N=12.7. Sources: salmon (-19.5, 14.0), crayfish (-25.0, 9.5), frog (-27.2, 10.0).

function.name: score_ant_colony_network_centrality
function.description: Compute betweenness centrality for each ant worker in a contact-network derived from RFID-tagged interactions.

prompt: Compute betweenness centrality for colony LF-22 using edges [['w1','w2',5], ['w2','w3',2], ['w1','w3',1]], excluding queens.

function.name: simulate_metapopulation_extinction
function.description: Run a stochastic metapopulation simulation with patch-specific carrying capacities and pairwise dispersal probabilities.

prompt: Simulate 500 stochastic replicates of Eurasian lynx (Lynx lynx) metapopulation over 100 years across three patches with capacities [40, 25, 30] and dispersal matrix [[0,0.05,0.02],[0.04,0,0.06],[0.01,0.05,0]].

function.name: annotate_cryptic_species_complex
function.description: Flag a sample as belonging to a cryptic species complex pending integrative taxonomy, with lines of evidence.

prompt: Flag sample MOSS-318 as part of the Brachythecium rutabulum complex with evidence from morphometrics, ITS sequence and chemotaxonomy, preliminarily lineage B.r.-East.
